headline: Upcoming - IEEE ISPSD
description: Prof. Zhang will serve as 2026 IEEE 38th International Symposium on Power Semiconductor Devices and ICs (ISPSD) Power IC Design (ICD) Chair.

headline: APEC Conference
description: Our group participated in IEEE Applied Power Electronics Conference and Exposition (APEC) 2026, and Prof. Zhang served as a session chair during the conference. Her student Xiangyu presented the work Self-Adjusting LFER-Based Dynamic Gate Driving Technique for Fast-Switching GaN HEMTs in 48-V Applications.

photos.caption: Ge Yuchu presenting poster at APEC 2026

headline: Asian Deans’ Forum 2025 – The Rising Stars Women in Engineering Workshop
description: Prof. Zhang was invited to serve as a mentor for the Asian Deans’ Forum 2025 – The Rising Stars Women in Engineering Workshop in Taipei, China. She offered participants valuable tips and insights on succeeding in academia as junior faculty members

photos.caption: Group photo at the Asian Deans’ Forum 2025 – The Rising Stars Women in Engineering Workshop
Group photo with Prof. Alicia Kyoung Jin AN (first left) and Prof. Albert Chi Shing CHUNG (first right)

headline: ISPSD Conference
description: Prof. Zhang served as a Power IC Design (ICD) chair at the International Symposium on Power Semiconductor Devices and ICs (ISPSD) 2025.

headline: ISPSD Conference
description: Prof. Zhang served as a session chair at the International Symposium on Power Semiconductor Devices and ICs (ISPSD) 2024.

headline: During Her Time at ADI
description: Before joining academia, Prof. Weijia Zhang worked at Analog Device, Inc. (ADI). Her industry experience continues to inspire our group’s research with strong practical relevance.

photos.caption: ADI engineers hit the slopes (Prof. Zhang, third from left)
